News

  1. Jul 2026

    Completed the M.Sc. in Mathematical Sciences with distinction as a Google DeepMind Scholar.

  2. Jan 2026

    Released the Latent Geometry of Taste recommender-systems preprint.

  3. Dec 2025

    Began research with the Machine Learning for Ecology group at AIMS.

  4. Oct 2025

    Attended the AIMS Quantum Learning Algorithms workshop.

  5. Sep 2025

    Presented work on multilingual transcription and translation at APCIT 2025.

  6. Aug 2025

    Received two Deep Learning Indaba poster awards for innovation and impact.

  7. Jul 2025

    Presented the contingency-screening work at EIECon 2025.

  8. Jun 2025

    Presented Fish-NET at Data Science Africa and began working as an AI/ML Engineer at Rio Eigen.

  9. 2025

    Received the Google DeepMind Master's Scholarship and the Zeribe Nwosu Foundation Scholarship.

  10. 2024

    Received the AWS AI & ML Scholarship and published Fish-NET and the SHAP/LIME interpretability study.
